_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Ignore gazebo11 dependencies for RHEL

We still want this repository to generate for RHEL so that we get
gazebo_msgs, but we don't currently have a mechanism for suppressing
individual packages on a per-generator basis. For now, we'll suppress
the dependencies and block the affected packages from building on the
buildfarm.

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>

files.patch:
@@ -110,6 +110,7 @@ tracks:
       :{release_inc} --os-name fedora
     - git-bloom-generate -y rosrpm --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro} -i
       :{release_inc} --os-name rhel
+      --skip-keys gazebo11 libgazebo11-dev
     devel_branch: ros2
     last_version: 3.5.1
     name: upstream

data.author: jacobperron
data.message:
Update developement track for Foxy (#1)

Signed-off-by: Jacob Perron <jacob@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ tracks:
       -i :{release_inc} --os-name debian --os-not-required
     - git-bloom-generate -y rosrpm --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro} -i
       :{release_inc}
-    devel_branch: ros2
+    devel_branch: foxy
     last_version: 3.5.0
     name: upstream
     patches: null

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+# gazebo_ros_pkgs-release
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ tracks:
       -i :{release_inc} --os-name debian --os-not-required
     - git-bloom-generate -y rosrpm --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro} -i
       :{release_inc}
-    devel_branch: ros2
+    devel_branch: crystal
     last_version: 3.1.0
     name: upstream
     patches: null
